name: Berry Banana Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Berries, fresh (blueberries, blackberries, or raspberries)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the berries gently and drain them. Sprinkle 2 tablespoons of flour on the berries and toss lightly.
2. Sift together the remaining flour, baking powder, salt, and baking soda.
3. Beat the margarine until creamy. Gradually add sugar and continue beating until light and fluffy.
4. Add the egg substitute a little at a time, mixing gently after each addition.
5. Add the mashed banana in 3 parts, folding it in until just combined.
6. Fold the berries carefully into the batter.
7. Pour the batter into a greased loaf pan (9 x 5 x 3 inches) and bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 50 minutes or until done.
